scorecard.notes: Fetches from market_signals via useIntelligence() TanStack Query v5. useDataFeedStats() and useStories() also wired. isLive flag controls PREVIEW banner. Vertical tab filters wired. No export/save (expected for public surface).
useIntelligence() + useDataFeedStats(). DEMO banner when !isLive. Confidence per card, freshness via updated_at. No source_name displayed inline — provenance WARN.
cms_posts table queried via useIntelligencePosts. isLive flag. Search, category filter, pagination, skeleton, error retry, empty state all present. No author attribution.

useProducts(), useProductSignals(), useIntelligence() all TanStack Query. isLive guard EXISTS at lines 94-103 — CLAUDE.md §4 item 9 is INCORRECT. Landing Cost Calculator correctly labeled DEMO. No source_name per signal card.
useIntelligence() for all 10 cloud modules. 6 AI tools with TierGate + CreditGate. CrossHubActionDispatcher in SignalDetailPanel. Dedicated Provenance tab. Skeleton loading. Most complete surface.

CRITICAL: getBrandMarketPosition(), getBrandPerformanceMetrics(), getResellerIntelligence(), getBrandCategoryPosition() all call pure mock data from brandPortalIntelligence.ts (seeded hash functions, no DB queries). Only topSignals uses live useIntelligence(). SKU table, operator network, revenue trend, category rankings are synthetic. Header says 'Live Signals + Demo Metrics' but per-section DEMO labels are absent. deriveOperatorEnrichment() presents computed synthetic data as provenance. CSV export missing on all tabs.

Queries market_signals (active, non-duplicate, limit 300), brands, brand_intelligence_report_jobs via TanStack Query. Report sections derived from live signals grouped by month. PDF/email queue writes to DB. DEMO badge hardcoded at line 471 — should be conditional.

CRITICAL: getTierPricing() and getTierFeatures() from mockTierData — entirely static mock. No Supabase query. No isLive flag. No DEMO/PREVIEW label anywhere on page. Violates CLAUDE.md §8. Uses font-playfair class (lines 104, 201). Upgrade button calls alert() — no Stripe integration.

useAdminIntelligence() fetches from market_signals, businesses, brands, account_subscriptions, api_registry, data_feeds. Realtime subscription on INSERT. Full CRUD (create/archive/delete signals). API health + feed status panels. LIVE/DEMO badge driven by isLive.

Best provenance implementation in codebase. Dedicated provenance block with source_name, source_url (external link), region, confidence score (HIGH/MODERATE/LOW). CrossHubActionDispatcher wired. ESC key closes panel.

surfaces: Brand Portal Intel Hub (signals section only)

demo_to_live.gap: Seeded category rankings. Requires platform-wide adoption analytics — dedicated edge function or materialized view.
Entirely static mock arrays. Must be labeled DEMO or wired to Stripe Products API / pricing table.

demo_to_live.gap: Imports mockSignals. All business portal intelligence is mock data. No live Supabase queries.
Falls back to mock maps when orders.length < 1. Until real order volume exists, shows mock data.

additional_findings.finding: Per-section DEMO labels missing on Brand Performance, Reseller Intelligence, and Market Position tabs despite all data being synthetic. Header badge says 'Live Signals + Demo Metrics' but individual sections are unlabeled.
No DEMO label anywhere on page. Static pricing presented as if real. Uses font-playfair class (lines 104, 201). Upgrade button calls alert() with no Stripe integration.

businessIntelligence.ts imports mockSignals. All business portal intelligence insights (OperatorInsights, GrowthOpportunities, DemandSignals, ReorderRisks) are generated from static mock data. Data origin is not surfaced to the user.
DEMO badge hardcoded at line 471 regardless of whether signals are live. Since buildReports() uses real market_signals data, the DEMO label is misleading when signals are populated.

In rowToSignal() at line 132, tier_visibility is hardcoded to 'free' for all DB rows. Client-side tieredSignals filter is therefore a no-op. If signals with tier_visibility='pro' are ever inserted, they will not be gated client-side.
HubError component (lines 117-135) uses hardcoded hex colors (#8E6464, #6E879B) instead of design tokens (text-signal-down, bg-accent). Minor token drift.
CLAUDE.md §4 item 9 ('IntelligenceCommerce.tsx missing isLive guard') is INCORRECT per current code. The isLive guard EXISTS at lines 94-103 with correct LIVE/DEMO banner behavior.

failures.reason: getBrandMarketPosition(), getBrandPerformanceMetrics(), getResellerIntelligence(), getBrandCategoryPosition() all call pure mock data functions. SKU performance, operator network, revenue trend, category rankings are all synthetic seeded values — no DB queries.
deriveOperatorEnrichment() presents computed synthetic data as verified enrichment. Provenance array shows status: 'degraded' and endpoint: null. No DEMO label on operator enrichment badges.
getTierPricing() and getTierFeatures() from mockTierData — entirely static mock arrays with no Supabase query and no isLive flag.
No DEMO/PREVIEW label anywhere on the page. Static pricing and feature data presented to authenticated brand portal users without disclosure. Violates CLAUDE.md §8.
Pricing claims (dollar amounts, feature inclusions) are hardcoded mock with no audit trail, no DB source, and no disclosure to the user.
